description: Ownership relation event — a LegalEntity (subject) owns/transfers/inherits/forecloses/leases a registry record (object). Append-only event log keyed by TID; chain of ownership reconstructed by reading by `subjectUri` or `objectUri` + sorting by `effectiveDate`. Per maps CLAUDE.md §Registry & Legal Entity Architecture (`edge_ownership`) + ADR-2605231400 kotoba-datomic L1.

subjectUri.description: AT URI of the LegalEntity acting as owner / transferor / lessee.

objectUri.description: AT URI of the Registry record being owned / transferred / inherited / leased.

sharePctBps.description: Ownership share in basis points (10000 = 100%). Integer to avoid float drift.

registryRef.description: Free-form reference to the source filing (e.g., 'JP-MOJ 13-01234 行 5').

supersededByUri.description: If a later record corrects this one (rare), point to the replacement. The original remains queryable for audit.
